accepted_scope: The 2/3/5 context trees, seven collection materialization counts, and build separability are accepted. The V4 cause ranking and four-variant measurement route are not accepted as decisions.
orchestrator_decision: Measure one V1+V2+V3 counterfactual: seedTags fast paths plus lazy resources, resourceListeners, and resourceControllers; keep structured execution collections eager.
downstream_authority: Fund DKR-P12 scratch-only counterfactual. Roll the dead full candidate out of the product working tree. AbortController remains unauthorized.
